hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" in *.env|*.env.*|*firebase-sa.json|*credentials.json|*serviceAccount*.json) echo 'BLOCKED: Refusing to edit secrets/credentials file. Use .env.example instead.' >&2; exit 2;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" in *package-lock.json|*poetry.lock|*Pipfile.lock) echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit lock files directly. Use npm install / pip install instead.' >&2; exit 2;; esac
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q 'taskit-frontend/src/.*\.[tj]sx\?$'; then cd taskit/taskit-frontend && npx eslint --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" 2>/dev/null; exit 0; fi
